keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Portugal 1, Uzbekistan 0. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by João Cancelo with a cross.
Odiljon Khamrobekov (Uzbekistan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Portugal 2, Uzbekistan 0. Nuno Mendes (Portugal) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

Goal! Portugal 3, Uzbekistan 0. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Bruno Fernandes with a through ball following a fast break.
Delay in match (Portugal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, Portugal 3, Uzbekistan 0.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Khojiakbar Alijonov replaces Sherzod Nasrullaev.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Akmal Mozgovoy replaces Odiljon Khamrobekov.
Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces João Cancelo.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Pedro Neto.
Second Half begins Portugal 3, Uzbekistan 0.
Own Goal by Abduvokhid Nematov, Uzbekistan. Portugal 4, Uzbekistan 0.
Substitution, Portugal. Trincão replaces João Félix.
Renato Veiga (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Igor Sergeev replaces Abbosbek Fayzullaev.
Substitution, Portugal. Bernardo Silva replaces João Neves.
Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces Vitinha.
Goal! Portugal 5, Uzbekistan 0. Rafael Leão (Portugal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Ruslanbek Jiyanov replaces Bekhruz Karimov.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Sherzod Esanov replaces Otabek Shukurov.
